## Description
Please describe what this pull request changes (e.g. which list is updated and why).

## Related issue
Closes #(issue number), if applicable.

## Type of change
- [ ] New block rule(s) / domain(s) added
- [ ] New allow/whitelist rule(s) added
- [ ] Removed or corrected a false positive
- [ ] Documentation / other change

## Testing / validation
Describe how you verified the change (e.g. tested on AdGuard Home / Technitium, confirmed the domain resolves/blocks as expected).

## Checklist
- [ ] Entries follow the AdGuard / Adblock Plus format used in this repo
- [ ] Entries are sorted / placed in the correct list file
- [ ] No duplicate entries introduced
- [ ] I have read the Contributing guidelines
